crowd_tips: Add crushed garlic for extra flavor
Use 6oz goat cheese instead of 8oz
Double the basil leaves for better taste

recipes.title: Best 100 Calorie Blueberry Muffins
recipes.description: Whip up a tasty batch of light blueberry muffins with ingredients you probably already have on hand.
crowd_tips: Drain frozen blueberries really well before using
Reduce baking time to 15-16 minutes
Add extra applesauce if batter seems too thick

recipes.title: Best Zucchini Appetizer
recipes.description: This is the best zucchini appetizer recipe made with Bisquick and Cheddar cheese for easy and savory bite-sized squares to serve at your next party.
crowd_tips: Cut oil to 1/3 cup for better texture
Drain shredded zucchini on paper towels before mixing
Toast leftovers before serving for better flavor and texture

recipes.title: The Best Thai Peanut Sauce
recipes.description: Best Thai peanut sauce uses peanut butter, coconut milk, lime juice, soy sauce, ginger, and garlic for an easy, flavorful, no-cook dipping sauce.
crowd_tips: Use whole can coconut milk, reduce peanut butter
Let sauce sit hours for flavors to meld
Add brown sugar or honey for sweetness

recipes.title: Simple Beef Tips and Noodles
recipes.description: Beef tips and noodles made in an Instant Pot is a great starter recipe for using a pressure cooker and is very quick and easy to make on a weeknight. It can also be made in a slow cooker.
crowd_tips: Reduce beef broth by half to prevent runny gravy
Double cornstarch amount for thicker consistency
Add Worcestershire sauce and red wine for flavor

recipes.title: Best Macaroni Salad
recipes.description: Very easy and delicious! I am constantly asked to bring this salad to parties and picnics. The cheese and ham are key additions to an old favorite.
ingredients: 1 cup cucumber - peeled, seeded and chopped
crowd_tips: Use only 1 tablespoon olive oil and vinegar
Whisk dressing ingredients together before adding to pasta
Use fresh onion instead of dried minced onion

recipes.title: Baked Macaroni and Cheese with Tomato
recipes.description: This is a quick and easy dinner or lunch recipe that has been in my family for years. Tomato soup adds a twist of flavor.
crowd_tips: Use half the macaroni for creamier texture
Add garlic and Italian seasoning to reduce blandness
Soak breadcrumbs in melted butter before topping

recipes.title: Dad's Pad Thai
recipes.description: This pad thai recipe features a homemade sauce made with brown sugar, fish sauce, and lime juice. It rivals what you'll find in top restaurants!
ingredients: 1 cup green onions cut into 1-inch pieces
crowd_tips: Use three eggs instead of four for better texture
Soak noodles in hot water, don't boil to prevent mushiness
Mix half fish sauce, half soy sauce for milder flavor

recipes.title: Best London Broil Ever!
recipes.description: Learn how to cook London broil in the oven and be rewarded with a delicious, juicy, tender steak that's perfect for feeding a hungry family.
ingredients: 1 teaspoon garlic salt, or to taste
crowd_tips: Cover with foil and cook at 325°F for 2.5 hours
Add brown sugar to reduce canned tomato acidity
Sear meat first before adding tomatoes and baking

recipes.title: Mom's Yeast Rolls
recipes.description: This is the best bread recipe. Light and fluffy rolls that melt in your mouth. Can be used to make loaves or cinnamon rolls.
crowd_tips: Add at least 1 cup more flour than recipe states
Let dough rise again after shaping into balls
Use 1/3 cup measure for uniform roll sizing

recipes.title: Classic Hollandaise Sauce
recipes.description: The classic Hollandaise Sauce, good for most green veggies, fish, steak, roast beef, Eggs Benedict, and more!!!
crowd_tips: Use much less salt - dash instead of teaspoon
Start with 2 tablespoons lemon juice, adjust to taste
Add butter slowly while whisking to prevent breaking
